name: xPay
description: xPay — India payment gateway with UPI, cards, and net banking support targeted at startups and developer-focused online merchants.

seo.title: xPay — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: xPay: xPay — India payment gateway with UPI, cards, and net banking support targeted at startups and developer-focused online merchants.

when_to_use: UPI payment integration for Indian startup e-commerce sites
Net banking and card checkout via xPay for Indian merchants
Developer-focused payment gateway API for Indian online businesses

pros: UPI, cards, and net banking in one API
cons: Small brand vs Razorpay or PayU India
review.verdict: Lower-friction Indian gateway for early startups — but Razorpay and Cashfree still dominate mindshare and scale.
review.best_for: Early-stage Indian startups wanting simple UPI and card integration
review.not_for: High-volume merchants or anyone needing top-tier India gateway reliability
